raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Context check-in","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately, Nina?","description":"Lets Nina set the context before the conversation narrows into load, priorities, or support.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Load after sprint","name":"Now that the sprint pressure has eased, what's still keeping your load high?","description":"Surfaces what is actually sustaining the late-night pattern after the obvious crunch has passed.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Hidden work","name":"What work is still sitting with you that others may not be seeing?","description":"Finds the invisible tasks or follow-through that can quietly inflate capacity pressure.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visibility gap","name":"Where does your work feel least visible right now?","description":"Explores the specific places where strong execution is not translating into recognition or influence.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Influence bottleneck","name":"What tends to slow decisions down when you need buy-in?","description":"Pinpoints the recurring dependency or interface problem that limits her influence.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Credit that lands","name":"What kind of recognition actually lands for you?","description":"Surfaces the form of acknowledgment that feels meaningful rather than generic praise.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Saying no","name":"What have you been saying no to lately?","description":"Checks whether she is protecting focus or still carrying too much old urgency forward.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Manager support","name":"What do you want more of from me right now?","description":"Gets specific about the support Nina wants, whether that is decisions, air cover, introductions, or coaching.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?","description":"Closes by turning the conversation into practical adjustments and support.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
